title: Incendium Better Combat Addon
description: Add Better Combat compatability to Incendium weapons
body:
Add Better Combat compatabilities to [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Incendium)'s weapons.

Datapack need to be installed before you obtain a weapon, weapons obtained before installing the pack won't be updated. 
For more customization, visit my [Github](https://github.com/NMDx86/IBCA)
